nasb.text: And they were giving him attention because he had for a long time astonished them with his magic arts.

esv.text: And they paid attention to him because for a long time he had amazed them with his magic.

cnv.text: 他們聽從他，因為他長久用邪術，使他們驚奇。

ccb.text: 他们听从他，因为他长期用邪术迷惑他们。

csbs.text: 他们听从他，因为他长期以来用邪术使他们十分惊讶。
